note: Format demo — Arnav's first real drop replaces this. Each day is one file in content/briefs/ named YYYY-MM-DD.json.

items.label: EXAMPLE — this is what a daily reel brief looks like
items.whyItWorks: Every reel you get comes with why it works, the hook to open with, the beats, and shot notes. Real ones have the reel link at the top. Check it off when you've filmed it.
items.hook: Everyone's betting on their country this week. The market says most of you are wrong.
script: Open on the hook, face to camera, no intro.
Beat 2: name the game and the number (pull up the Kalshi/Polymarket line on your phone).
Beat 3: the twist — what the market sees that fans don't.
Close: 'the full read is on Lockr' — one line, don't oversell.
items.shotNotes: Phone at eye level, clean background, first 2 seconds land the hook. 20-35s total, captions on.
items.caption: Suggested IG caption goes here, ready to paste.
